subcodes.first_line: At all times doth the All-Merciful call out: "Unto Me, unto Me, O My servants! Unto Me, unto Me, O My handmaidens! Blessed is he who heareth." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی کل الاحیان ینادی الرحمن الی الی یا عبادی الی الی یا امائی طوبی لمن سمع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
